description: Coauthor audit hooks: capture user prompts, Agent/SendMessage dispatches, and assistant responses into <cwd>/coauthor/audit/. Matcher 'Agent|SendMessage' uses regex alternation (per https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks: any matcher containing chars beyond letters/digits/_/escaped-pipe is treated as JS regex). Sub-agent dispatch tool is 'Agent' (not 'Task') in current Claude Code builds; 'SendMessage' is captured for the user's standing-worker SendMessage variant.
